positive: A mystical bioluminescent forest scene blended with celestial elements. Deep indigo and sapphire blue hues dominating, contrasted by neon emerald and gold accents. Highly detailed vector illustration style, featuring stylized, glowing flora, massive root systems that resemble constellations, and drifting luminous particles. Central composition, perfect for a chest print, with clear, graphic silhouettes of stylized fantasy elements. Clean lines, high contrast, deep saturation, matte print finish, tattoo flash aesthetic, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, grainy, low detail, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, jpeg artifacts, noise, cropped, photorealistic
